metadata.description: Deployment environment.
Location for all resources.
Unique suffix for globally unique resource names. Use a short lowercase token, e.g. a1b2c3.
Tags applied to all resources.
App Service Plan SKU name.
App Service Plan tier.
App Service Plan instance count.
App Service Linux runtime stack. Example: DOTNETCORE|10.0.
Service Bus namespace SKU. Basic, Standard, or Premium.
Azure SQL administrator login name.
Azure SQL administrator password.
Azure SQL database name.
Current runner public IPv4 address to allow through the Azure SQL firewall.
Azure SQL database SKU name. Example: GP_S_Gen5_1.
Azure SQL database tier. Example: GeneralPurpose.
Azure SQL minimum vCores for serverless, represented as a JSON number string (for example 0.5).
Azure SQL auto-pause delay in minutes. Set to -1 to disable.
Azure PostgreSQL administrator login name.
Azure PostgreSQL administrator password.
Azure PostgreSQL database name used by Products domain.
Current runner public IPv4 address to allow through the Azure PostgreSQL firewall.
Azure PostgreSQL flexible server SKU name. Example: Standard_B1ms.
Azure PostgreSQL flexible server tier. Example: Burstable.
Azure PostgreSQL major version. Example: 16.
Azure PostgreSQL storage size in GB.
Azure Managed Redis SKU name. Example: Balanced_B0.
Azure Managed Redis high availability mode.

connectionString.value: [format('Data Source=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};User id={2};Password={3};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName')), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('databaseName'), parameters('adminLogin'), parameters('adminPassword'))]

[format('Server={0}.postgres.database.azure.com;Port=5432;Database={1};User Id={2};Password={3};Ssl Mode=Require;', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'), parameters('adminLogin'), parameters('adminPassword'))]

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(variables('sharedAppSettings'), variables('sqlDbAppSettings'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ProductsApi__BaseAddress', 'value', format('https://{0}', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', format('app-products-api-{0}-{1}', parameters('environmentType'), parameters('suffix'))), '2023-12-01').defaultHostName))))]
